projects.name: csv-to-jsonl
projects.description: Convert CSV files to JSONL (newline-delimited JSON) with smart type inference
features: Stream large files line by line
projects.purpose: A dev utility for data engineers who need to convert CSV to JSONL for ETL pipelines

projects.name: markdown-notes
projects.description: Minimal Next.js app to browse, search, and render local Markdown files as HTML
features: Reads .md files from a local directory
projects.purpose: A lightweight documentation browser for personal notes or project wikis

projects.name: status-page
projects.description: HTTP health-check API server that monitors endpoints and returns their status
features: Return JSON with status codes and response times
Configurable via env or config file
projects.purpose: A self-hosted uptime monitor for small projects and services

projects.name: tiny-validator
projects.description: Lightweight schema validation library with fluent API, zero dependencies
features: String, number, boolean, array, object validators
projects.purpose: A small, focused validation library for when Joi/Zod is too heavy

projects.name: env-diff
projects.description: Compare .env files across environments (dev/staging/prod) and report missing or extra keys
features: Flag missing keys, extra keys, and value changes
Exit with code 1 on mismatch for CI pipelines
projects.purpose: A DevOps utility to catch environment drift between deployments

projects.name: log-analyzer
projects.description: Parse and analyze log files: count levels, find top IPs, detect error bursts
features: Common log format and JSON log support
Error burst detection by time window
projects.purpose: Quick on-the-box log triage without a full observability stack

projects.name: qr-api
projects.description: Lightweight HTTP API server that generates QR codes from text payloads
features: POST text/URL → returns PNG QR code
projects.purpose: Self-hosted QR code service for internal tools and integrations

projects.name: csv-dedupe
projects.description: Deduplicate CSV files using fuzzy matching on specified columns
projects.purpose: Clean up messy CSV exports before importing into a database

projects.name: pyretry
projects.description: Decorator-based retry utility with exponential backoff, jitter, and custom predicates
projects.purpose: A reusable Python library for making any function resilient to transient failures

projects.name: text-cluster
projects.description: Cluster text documents using TF-IDF + K-means (stdlib-only, zero ML deps)
projects.purpose: Educational text clustering tool to group documents by topic without external ML libraries
